=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/flatMapToMap_preview.ts(4,3): suggestion TS377100: `Effect.map` expresses this success-value transformation more directly than `Effect.flatMap` followed by `Effect.succeed`. effect(flatMapToMap)


==== /.src/flatMapToMap_preview.ts (1 errors) ====
    import { Effect } from "effect"
    
    const program = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
      Effect.flatMap((value) => Effect.succeed(value + 1))
      ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! suggestion TS377100: `Effect.map` expresses this success-value transformation more directly than `Effect.flatMap` followed by `Effect.succeed`. effect(flatMapToMap)
    )
